entities.name: God (Deus)

attributes.nature: infinite mercy, immeasurable greatness, king of kings, creator, savior, threefold and one
attributes.roles: granter, arranger, disposer, stabilizer of foundations, judge

entities.raw_quote: O God, always the way, the truth, and the life... Rex regum, Deus infinite misericordie et maiestatis inmense

entities.name: Holy Spirit (Spiritus sanctus)

attributes.function: virtue, grace, source of illumination and strength

entities.raw_quote: through the virtue of the Holy Spirit... that the Holy Spirit may be shaped in me

entities.name: Jesus Christ (Iesu Christe)
entities.raw_quote: Iesu Christe, fili Dei unigenite, cui ante secula dedit Pater omnia in manus

entities.name: Adam
entities.raw_quote: the spring, which you revealed to the first man Adam

entities.name: Abraham
entities.raw_quote: you... to your servants Abraham, Isaac and Jacob

entities.name: Moses
entities.raw_quote: you... who to Moses and Abraham, your servants... bestowed grace

entities.name: Devil (Diaboli)
entities.raw_quote: that... I may prevail in the face of the devil, the enemy of the humbly.

entities.name: LXXIV Latin Prayer
entities.raw_quote: O God, always the way, the truth, and the life, give your light to flourish in my conscience

entities.name: LXXV Prayer 18
entities.raw_quote: Honzmorb. lemogethon. hegemothon. hazathay. hazathar. hazamathar.

entities.name: LXXVIII Latin Prayer
entities.raw_quote: O king of kings, God of infinite mercy and immeasurable greatness

entities.name: LXXIX Prayer 20
entities.raw_quote: Hofob, Deus, Pater inmense, a quo procedit omne, quod bonum est

entities.name: LXXXI Latin Prayer
entities.raw_quote: O King, eternal God, judge and discerner of all good consciences

entities.name: LXXXII Prayer 22
entities.raw_quote: Hanethi, O God, the author and foundation of all piety
